lines.speaker: Commander Connad
lines.text: Sorry soldier, you don't have permission to speak with me yet. Go and talk to the Captain.

lines.speaker: Commander Connad
lines.text: Gamble, you say! Let me take something from my big bag of prizes!

lines.speaker: Commander Connad
lines.text: Lucky dip, you say! Let me take something from my big bag of prizes!

lines.speaker: Commander Connad
lines.text: I've got my hand on something!

lines.speaker: Commander Connad
lines.text: Don't you want it anymore? I'll buy it back off you for [X] points in each of the four roles.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I believe you might be able to reward me for my progress in this arena?

lines.speaker: Commander Connad
lines.text: Well, that depends upon your skill levels for each role.

lines.speaker: Commander Connad
lines.text: Okay. What exactly do you want to know, [player name]?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I trade some of my points?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What points do I have so far, sir?

lines.speaker: Commander Connad
lines.text: You have absolutely no points, whatsoever. Best you get back into that arena!

lines.speaker: Commander Connad
lines.text: You have: [amount] Attacker Honour Points, [amount] Defender Honour Points, [amount] Collector Honour Points and [amount] Healer Honour Points.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could I have a Queen Help book?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, no. Wait, I don't have enough space to carry one.

lines.speaker: Commander Connad
lines.text: Well, you can come back and get one at any time from me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could I have my current wave reset to one?

lines.speaker: Commander Connad
lines.text: You do realise that you're already on wave one?
